scenarios.description: After caching childElementsList, empty() invalidates cache and child(0) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
scenarios.precondition: Element parent with one Element child, child(0) invoked once to populate cache
scenarios.expectedResult: IndexOutOfBoundsException thrown on second child(0) after empty()
pseudocode: TEST TC09 cache invalidation on empty

scenarios.description: child(1) filters only Element nodes among mixed children and returns second Element
scenarios.precondition: Element container with sequence: TextNode, Element a, TextNode, Element b
scenarios.expectedResult: child(1) returns the second Element b
